response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack engineering fundamentals, some distributed-systems exposure, and current AI tooling work, but the resume contains no evidence of the core domain expertise this role demands: A/B experimentation platforms, feature-flagging infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, statistical analysis, or growth measurement systems. The seniority level (Senior/Staff IC) also falls short of the Principal/IC6 scope, which requires owning multi-workstream architectural initiatives and influencing experimentation quality across an entire organization. Without any traceable signal in experimentation or metrics infrastructure, the candidate is a poor fit regardless of general engineering competence.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling contributions at re:cinq, relevant to the role's 'AI-first' engineering emphasis
Consistent application of software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) across multiple production roles
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in a 17-year career
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, or statistical/data-analysis background evident in any role
Seniority gap: current and historical titles are Senior/Staff; the role targets Principal/IC6 with organization-wide architectural ownership

key_factors.factor: Seniority and scope mismatch vs. IC6
